title: Unexpected behavior for unchanging state elements
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
Run the following in the directory where you download the tarball.
```
tar -xzvf frozenvar.tar.gz
cd frozenvar
yosys -s commands.ys
```
The commands simply read and prepare the design, then runs `show`.

## Expected behavior

Yosys will interpret the process such that `out` has no initial value, but always remains the same.

## Actual behavior

Yosys creates a buffer and drives `out` with an `x` value.

[frozenvar.tar.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3494450/frozenvar.tar.gz)
